assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 8-9 show the JQL query: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC". Both required labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 27-29: "Current issue TC-8021 stream scope: rhtpa-2.1" and "TC-8022 summary contains (rhtpa-2.1) -- matches current stream". The filtering explicitly checks the task summary for the stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 39-49 show Action 1: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: "TC-8021", outwardIssue: "TC-8022", type: "Depend") described as "the standard remediation linkage between the CVE Jira (TC-8021) and its remediation task (TC-8022)".

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 53-63 show Action 2: labels updated from [ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123, security-preemptive] to [ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-55123] with explicit statement: "The security-preemptive label is removed because TC-8022 is no longer a preemptive task -- it is now a standard remediation task linked to its proper CVE Jira (TC-8021) via Depend."

assertion_results.text: Step 7 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md lines 38-40: "Step 7 remediation task creation is skipped for stream rhtpa-2.1 because Step 4.4 reconciliation linked the existing preemptive task TC-8022 as the remediation task for TC-8021. Creating a new task would be a duplicate." Also triage-outcome.md line 55: "7 | Remediation | SKIPPED -- existing task TC-8022 covers this stream".
